creator: vrwmiller@gmail.com
text:
Thanks for the patch. It also requires the patch in bug #239022 to start sssd in daemon mode. I tested both patches, which apply cleanly, and sssd 1.13.4 w/ SMB=on builds with ldb15 and samba410 and functions as desired.

Samba is installed here as a consequence of sssd. As long as it builds and functions as desired, Samba version is negligible.
